pi_items.source: Matches the prompt description requirement to create the folder at `%APPDATA%\Talon\user\win_management\`.
Matches the explicit list of files in the prompt description.

privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for talon_env create_window_manager task by discovering that the task is defective. Critical scripts (setup_task.ps1, export_result.ps1) are missing from the environment, which breaks the verifier completely because it attempts to read the non-existent task_result.json output file. The required output directory and expected file mappings exactly match the explicit instructions in the prompt description.
